Complete feature map
All 5 widgets and 40+ modules of the QA Analyzer framework.
🎉 Framework complete
5 standalone HTML files  ·  40+ AI-powered panels  ·  Claude API streaming throughout
Each file is self-contained with dark mode, API key management, and zero dependencies.
Open any file directly in your browser — no server, build step, or npm required.
